title: Add unit tests for event_loop.rs with mocked AsyncMavConnection
description: The largest module (1,772 lines) has no #[cfg(test)] block and relies entirely on SITL integration tests which are slow and require Docker. Create focused unit tests by mocking the AsyncMavConnection trait to test state updates, command dispatch, retry logic, and error handling.

title: Consider sub-grouping Telemetry struct or field-level change detection
description: src/state.rs Telemetry is a 27-field flat struct. Every MAVLink message update triggers a watch notification even if consumer only cares about GPS. Consider sub-grouping (position, battery, attitude) or providing field-level change detection to reduce unnecessary wake-ups.

title: Optimize TlogFile::seek_to_timestamp with binary search
description: src/tlog/file.rs:32 seek_to_timestamp does O(n) linear scan. For large TLOG files (100MB+), implement binary search on 8-byte timestamps for dramatically faster seeking.

title: Replace raw severity u8 with typed enum in StatusMessage
description: src/state.rs:208 StatusMessage uses severity: u8. Replace with a typed MavSeverity enum (Emergency, Alert, Critical, Error, Warning, Notice, Info, Debug) for better API ergonomics.

title: Extract CommandContext struct for handler functions
description: Nearly every handler in event_loop.rs takes the same 5-6 parameters (connection, writers, vehicle_target, config, cancel). Extract a CommandContext struct to reduce repetition and clean up signatures.

title: Fix README: update mavkit version from 0.2 to 0.3
description:
README.md line 22 still shows mavkit = "0.2" in the Rust install section. Should be "0.3" to match current version.

Additionally, update scripts/check_tag_version.py to also verify that README.md contains the correct major.minor version string (e.g. mavkit = "0.3" for tag v0.3.0). This prevents the README from going stale again on future releases. Parse the tag version to extract major.minor and search README for the pattern.

title: Remove or use dead AutopilotType::to_mav method
description: src/state.rs:191 has #[allow(dead_code)] on AutopilotType::to_mav. Either use the method somewhere or remove it. Suppressing dead code warnings is a code smell.

title: Add Python async context manager support for Vehicle
description: Currently requires manual 'await vehicle.disconnect()'. Implement __aenter__/__aexit__ on PyVehicle so users can write 'async with Vehicle.connect_udp(...) as vehicle:' for more Pythonic resource management.

title: Run rustfmt and fix clippy blockers
description: Apply required formatting updates and fix the current clippy failures so the Rust workspace quality gates pass, then commit and push the result.
close_reason: Completed quality-gate cleanup and pushed code changes.

title: Optimize TlogFile::time_range to avoid full file scan
description: src/tlog/file.rs:86 time_range reads first timestamp then scans every entry to find the last one. Instead, seek to near-EOF and scan backwards for the last valid timestamp.

title: Fix VehicleIdentity always returning 0 for system_id/component_id
description: src/vehicle.rs:288-289 always returns 0 for system_id and component_id because these are tracked in VehicleTarget inside the event loop but not exposed through watch channels. Either expose them properly via the watch channel or remove the fields from VehicleIdentity.

title: Use dedicated heartbeat_received flag instead of heuristic
description: src/vehicle.rs:127 uses heuristic (custom_mode != 0 || armed || !mode_name.is_empty()) to detect first heartbeat. This could miss valid heartbeats where custom_mode == 0, vehicle is disarmed, and mode name lookup fails. Add a dedicated heartbeat_received: bool field to VehicleState.

title: Remove redundant VehicleConfig field-by-field copy in from_connection
description: In src/vehicle.rs:97-104, from_connection manually copies every field of config into a new VehicleConfig instead of just passing config directly. This is redundant and error-prone if new fields are added.

title: Add tlog feature flag to README feature table
description: The feature flags table in README.md (lines 78-84) is missing the tlog feature added in v0.3.0. Add a row: tlog | No | TLOG file parser for timestamped MAVLink logs.

title: Add TLOG recording and raw message broadcast
description: Add TlogWriter (inverse of TlogReader), raw message broadcast channel on Vehicle, and Python bindings for RawMessage/RawMessageStream
close_reason: TlogWriter, raw message broadcast, and Python bindings implemented

title: Replace magic number 242.0 with named constant for HOME_POSITION message ID
description: src/event_loop.rs:116 uses magic number 242.0 as param1 for MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE to request HOME_POSITION. Should be a named constant like HOME_POSITION_MSG_ID for readability.

title: Add Python binding tests beyond smoke test
description: CI only runs 'import mavkit' as a smoke test. Add property-based or integration tests for Python bindings to catch marshaling bugs, verify async behavior, and test error propagation from Rust to Python exceptions.

title: Split event_loop.rs into submodules
description: event_loop.rs is 1,772 lines (39% of core code). Split into event_loop/mod.rs (main loop + dispatch), event_loop/state_update.rs, event_loop/commands.rs, event_loop/mission.rs, event_loop/params.rs for better navigability and maintainability.

title: Update state during COMMAND_ACK wait to avoid telemetry gaps
description: send_command_long_ack (src/event_loop.rs:588) intentionally does not update watch state while waiting for ACK. This means messages received during command retries are silently dropped, causing potential telemetry gaps. Consider forwarding non-ACK messages to update_state.
